titleStmt.title: Diplomatic transcription of MS Cambridge CUL Add. 2491

msContents.summary: A paper manuscript in Devanāgarī script. The manuscript supports Gayadāsa's Nyāyacandrikā commentary on parts of the Śārīrasthāna of the Suśrutasaṃhitā.

revisionDesc.change: Tweaks to the TEI header, and xml tagging. Added the head elements

div.head: [Adhyāya 1]
div.l:
G.3.1.2
bālo tikaṃ kṛtaṃ prāṇikāyaṃ tasyedaṃ hetusvalakṣaṇakāryaciṃtayā sthānam iti|| hetutvād iti eva viśeṣo rali
vyākhyā prakathayiṣyāmā|| yathovāca dhanvaṃtarir iti pratisaṃskartṛsūtraṃ||

G.3.1.3
tatrādau hetuniścaṃtanam āha|| sarvabhū
tānām ityādi|| sarvabhūtāni kṛtyāni utpādayaṃti| vakṣyamāṇamahadāyāmūlatagaṃ tasya kāraṇaṃ kiṃ tad ity āhā
avyaktaṃ nāma || nāmaprasiddhyupasaṃgrahe|| tatra vyaktam api yat dravyaṃ prasiddhaṃ || tena vyaktād avyaktam iti || paramātma
ny api avyaktasaṃjñā nirastā | kiṃ tad avyaktaśabdaprasiddham ity āha| satvarajastamolakṣaṇam iti| carake || puna
r ātmany evāvyaktavyapadeśā|| ata eva caturviṃśatikatatvaṃ || tasyāvyaktasya kāraṇam athāstīti darśayann āha||
akāraṇam iti avidyamānotpattihetrur aṣṭarūpam iti|| aṣṭau rūpāṇi cāsya|| etā ca tā buddhi ahaṃkāraspā
ñcatanmātrāṇāṃ pṛthakkāraṇatvaṃ niṣiddhaṃ|| anye pi pradhānasyaiva pariṇamato buddhyādīni rūpāṇīty ūcuḥ||cha|| aṣṭa
rūpam ity atra jajā|| avyaktabuddhyahaṃkārāḥ|| pañcamahābhūtānīty āha|| paṭhaṃti ca vyāsam|| bhūmir āpo nalo vā
mano buddhir eva ca | ahaṃkāra itīyaṃ me bhinnā prakṛtir aṣṭadhā||1||BhG 7.4 tathāpi hi vara ke 'pi|| svādīni bu
sahaṃ kāras tathāṣṭama iti|| tatra vyāsasya manasā pratiṣṭā nirddeśe na carakasya va
ruṣo pa śatabhinna darśanatvāt|| atra sarvabhūtānām ity asya bhāṣyaṃ nirddiśann āha|| akhila
ma stasya mahadāditatvabhūtabhavanopakaraṇātmakaviśvasya bhavahetur iti||cha|| upādānakāraṇam iti||
atha || saṃbhavasya hetur ity ato bhavaṃti|| tatrākhila jagadutpādakārakasya mahadādir ity arthaḥ|| tadekami
ti śilopaṭṭavat sāmyāvasthāyāṃ sthitena punas tridaṃḍavat|| ataḥ śilākākalyaṃśilokakalyaṃ bhinnam etat vyavasthitam|
anekeṣāṃ bahūnāṃ kṣetrajñānāṃ śarīravidāṃ karmmapuruṣāṇāṃ teṣāṃ śarīrabhāvāya|| adhiṣṭāṇaṃ viṣayaḥ||
eteṣāṃ karmmātmakānāṃ punaḥ parityāgam eva|| ekam anekeṣāṃ adhiṣṭānam iti|| prasrutam upamānena saṃbaṃdaṃ ku
rvann āha||cha|| audakānāṃ bhāvānām iti||udakabhāvāsv audakāḥ|| nadīnadasarastaḍāgaprabhṛtayaḥ|| ānye
audakabhāvā matsyādaya ity āhuḥ|| tan na manyaṃte|| gaṃgādyadhiṣṭānatvāt|| audakānāṃ bhāvānāṃ pradeśākhyā
pako dṛṣṭoparsmmavatad evāvyaktaṃ karaṇatve nādhikṛtaṃ|| sarvabhūtānāṃ kāraṇam iti vacanāt|| ātmanaḥ puna
r bhūtasadbhāvina akāraṇatvaṃ nityatvaṃ ca|| sadakāraṇavan nityam iti vacanāt|| ata eva kṣetrajñasya paṃgvaṃdha
r iva saṃyogaḥ|| tad uktaṃ|| puruṣasya darśanārthaṃ kevalyārthaṃ|| tathā pradhmanasya|| paṃgvaṃdhavad ubhayor api| saṃyo
gā tatkṛtā sargraḥ |pulliṃgasaṃjñā tatkṛta iti tat sa yoga kṛtaḥ| saṃskṛta iti satvādilakaṇaḥ| nanu ka
smād ekasmāt anekakarmmaṇāṃ sarvvabhūtānāṃ utpāda ucyate | anekaśaktipracitāt pradhānād kṣetrajñādhiṣṭitān mahān utpadyate| eva kevalāt kāryabhe
dāt prajāyaṃte| mahattatvaṃ jāyate
prakṛter buddhir jñāyate ity arthaḥ| saiva kāryātmikāt eva buddheḥ karaṇaṃ| sā tu cicchaktir nirmmanādarppaṇamūrtti
r iva rūpādyarthachāyām anupratipadyate| samahān talliṃgam iti| talliṃgādiviśeṣaṇena śuddhasatvānāṃ a
vadhāraṇavyavachinnamātravivekalakṣaṇam asatyāṃ buddhiṃ nirasyati| tad uktaṃ carake| suddhasatvasya yā suddhā
satyā buddhiḥ pravarttate| yayā bhinatty atibalaṃ mahāmohamayaṃ tamaḥ| sarvvabhāvasvabhāvajño yayā bhavati nispṛ
haḥ|| yogaṃ yayā sādhayati sāṃkhyaḥ saṃpadyate yayā|| yayā nopaityahaṃkāraṃ nopāste kāraṇaṃ yayā| yayā nālaṃ
bate kiṃcit sarvaṃ saṃpadyate yayā| yāṃti brahma yayā nityam akṣaraṃ ca tathākṣaraṃ| tathā punar api tatraivoktaṃ|
yāvad utpadyate satyā buddhir nnaitad ahaṃ yayā| naiva tanmātramativijñānaya jñaḥ sarvvam ativarttate rūpādyartha
yāntarāśrayā punar ahaṃkārakaraṇāt| ahaṃkāras tu kāryabuddhiteda eva yena carake kāryabuddhiviva
ṇenaivāhaṃkāro pi vivṛtaḥ | | tathā ca|| kāraṇāni mano buddhir buddhiḥ karmmeṃdriyāṇi ca | buddher hi grahaṇe
ni vāhaṃkāragrahaṇāt sa tu| trividhā vaikārikādibhedena| vaikārikādisaṃjñās tu pūrvācāryaiḥ saṃvyavahārā
ya kṛtāḥ|| vaikārikādiṣu yato yad utpadyate tat sannirddiśann āha|| tatra vaikārikādityādi|| tatra vaikārika
sātvikās tejaso rājasaḥ| bhūtāditāmasaḥ| sātvikās tejāso rājasaḥ bhūtāditāmasaḥ sātvikād rājasa
sahāyāt| tamomātrānuviddhāt| ekadeśeṃdriyāṇi tallalakṣaṇāni prakāśarūpāṇi | tāny ahaṃkārād utpannā
ni| ahaṃkārāṇīṃdriyāṇīti sāṃkhye vaidyake tu bhautikāni| tata evaṃ pūrvāṇi triśrotrādīni ghrāṇāṃtāni||
buddhīṃdriyāṇi buddher buddher āśrayatvāt|| teṣām karmmāśrayāṇītarāṇi vāgādīni pādāṃtāni| ubhayātmakaṃ
mana iti| ubhayeṃdriyasvabhāvam iti| pravṛtto hi teṣāṃ manasā sahā bhinnānām eva pravṛttā tat sa bhāvam iva vṛ
bhūtādir iti|| tāmasāt tejaso sahāyāt sātvamātrayānuviddhāt| tallakṣaṇāny eva mohādi
lakṣaṇaṃ nirddiśann āha|| vātavarṇṇetyādi| tatra vātavedanāvarṇṇāḥ syā vāruṇādayaḥ| pittasya varṇṇāḥ pītanīlahāri
drādayaḥ| vedanā punar opaśoṣacoradāhādayaḥ |śleṣmaṇas tu varṇṇāḥ| śvetādayaḥ| vedanāḥ kaṃḍvādayaḥ| gaṃdhas tu vāyo
r nnāsty eva| kaphasya ca viśro gaṃdho 'nukto 'pi draṣṭavyaḥ| kaphaduṣṭe pittasya gaṃdhaṃ kuṇape pūtipūyābhe ca vakṣati
śoṇitavarṇṇam iti| śoṇitavarmmaṃ pittavedanaṃ kuṇapagaṃdhaṃ carake | kuṇapaḥ śabaḥśavaḥ kuṇapasyeva gaṃdhe 'syeti||
upamānāc ceti samāsāṃtaḥ| tato janakasya śoṇitasyāpi doṣā evaṃ dūṣayitāro 'pi apadeśas tu ghṛtataila
dugdhavat| tad uktam
